g.text: Converts hardware or hotkey activity into typed events.
ScreenshotCaptured is cached until the next accepted turn.
speak, submit clipboard, or capture screen
cache image for next accepted request
reject if another turn is busy
record user text or WAV asynchronously
[until final answer or tool-call budget is exhausted]
collect answer; pause mic on first token
buffer and synthesize complete speech units
render final state and journal events
Tool use is optional. With MCP disabled, Registry returns no enabled
tools and ToolAwareDialog delegates directly to OllamaBackend.
Response completion ordering is deliberate: flush TTS, record history,
wait for playback, resume the microphone, then publish TurnCompleted.
